reasoning: The Lean signature captures both hypotheses and the conclusion faithfully. `[CommRing R] [IsDomain R]` matches "integral domain". `[GCDMonoid R]` provides gcd existence (equivalent in an integral domain to the existence-of-gcd part of condition (i)), and h1 adds the Bezout-like representability for nonzero elements, which together match (i). h2 directly encodes condition (ii): for any sequence of nonzero elements with $a_{i+1} \mid a_i$, the chain eventually becomes associate. The "positive integer N" in the informal vs. `N : ℕ` in Lean is inconsequential. The conclusion `IsPrincipalIdealRing R`, combined with `IsDomain R`, is exactly the definition of PID. Since gcd is unique up to unit and the representability property is invariant under associates, the choice of gcd function in the `GCDMonoid` instance does not introduce a mismatch.
